---
title: "Recent news"
subtitle: "Posts on events, news, papers, and more"
description-meta: "Posts on papers, events, news, and more"
listing: 
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 10
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  contents: 
      - posts/**/*.qmd
      #- posts/post-links.yml
  #categories: [] 

page-layout: full
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#posts}
:::
